# services.litellm

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.litellm`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.litellm.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable LiteLLM server. |
| `services.litellm.environment` | `attribute set of string` | Extra environment variables for LiteLLM. |
| `services.litellm.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Environment file to be passed to the systemd service. Useful for passing secrets to the service to prevent them from being world-readable in the Nix store. |
| `services.litellm.host` | `string` | The host address which the LiteLLM server HTTP interface listens to. |
| `services.litellm.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the firewall for LiteLLM. This adds `services.litellm.port` to `networking.firewall.allowedTCPPorts`. |
| `services.litellm.package` | `package` | The litellm package to use. |
| `services.litellm.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Which port the LiteLLM server listens to. |
| `services.litellm.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Configuration for LiteLLM. See <https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/proxy/configs> for more. |
| `services.litellm.settings.environment_variables` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Environment variables to pass to the Lite |
| `services.litellm.settings.general_settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | LiteLLM Server settings |
| `services.litellm.settings.litellm_settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | LiteLLM Module settings |
| `services.litellm.settings.model_list` | `YAML 1.1 value` | List of supported models on the server, with model-specific configs. |
| `services.litellm.settings.router_settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | LiteLLM Router settings |
| `services.litellm.stateDir` | `absolute path` | State directory of LiteLLM. |
